creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freshports.org/security/clamav/#message> 
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/security/clamav/files/pkg-message.in> 

– the package message relates solely to removal. 

<https://www.freshports.org/security/clamav-lts/#message> 
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/security/clamav-lts/files> 

– there's no package message. 

It will be useful to have a package message for both files that relates to installation. 

Suitable lines are currently # commented at 
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/security/clamav/files/clamav-clamd.in?id=11ce5b3d719c4e44114f0557144a3a773cabfcfd#n9> lines 9–14. 

Thanks
